description: A Compensation Specialist needs to automate the monthly compensation snapshot and daily salary anomaly detection processes. Connect to the Oracle HR database (host=localhost, port=1521, service=XEPDB1, user=hr, password=hr123) and implement an automation pipeline. Create a table COMPENSATION_SNAPSHOTS (cols: snapshot_id, snapshot_date, employee_id, full_name, job_title, salary, department_name, commission_pct) and a table SALARY_ANOMALIES (cols: anomaly_id, detected_date, employee_id, employee_name, department_name, salary, dept_avg_salary, deviation_pct, anomaly_type). Develop a stored procedure CAPTURE_COMP_SNAPSHOT to populate the snapshot table and a procedure DETECT_SALARY_ANOMALIES to identify employees with salaries >150% ('ABOVE_RANGE') or <50% ('BELOW_RANGE') of their department average. Schedule these using DBMS_SCHEDULER: MONTHLY_COMP_SNAPSHOT (monthly on the 1st at 2 AM) and DAILY_ANOMALY_CHECK (daily at 6 AM). Execute both jobs immediately and export the resulting table contents to /home/ga/Desktop/compensation_snapshots.csv and /home/ga/Desktop/salary_anomalies.csv.
